S01 E32 — Death at Dawn A member of a powerful gang murders a shopkeeper; the deputized Cartwrights sentence a murderer to hang at dawn when the leader of the gang kidnaps Ben and holds him hostage.
programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: A doctor (John Forsythe) sets an expiration date with a rich patient's (Richard Kiley) wife (Reta Shaw).
programme.title: Murder Once Removed

programme.desc: Horrible old movies hosted by Dr. Paul Bearer direct from his home, the Tenement Castle.
programme.title: Dr. Paul Bearer's Creature Feature

programme.desc: Corrupted by a lord (George Sanders), Oscar Wilde's London aristocrat (Hurd Hatfield) stays young, but his portrait begins to age.
programme.title: The Picture of Dorian Gray

programme.desc: Kipling's boy hero Mowgli (Sabu), lost in the jungle, is adopted by animals and taught how they talk.
programme.title: Jungle Book

programme.desc: S01 E01 — The Thin Rope Jim Hardie guards a stagecoach carrying gold.
programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir at Temple Square performs songs of hope, faith and inspiration; singing sacred hymns both new and old from around the world as well as uplifting selections from the American songbook.
programme.title: Music & the Spoken Word

programme.desc: A dancing princess (Rita Hayworth) loves a Roman commander (Stewart Granger) and inspires King Herod (Charles Laughton) to have John the Baptist beheaded.
programme.title: Salome

programme.desc: A small-town Mississippi boss tries to pair his daughter (Joanne Woodward) with an enigmatic drifter (Paul Newman).
programme.title: The Long, Hot Summer

programme.desc: Sitting in a wheelchair, his leg in a cast, a photographer (James Stewart) spies on courtyard neighbors and sees a murder.
programme.title: Rear Window

programme.desc: A secret agent blocks a villain's helio-beam plot in the second of four Matt Helm movies.
programme.title: Murderers' Row

programme.desc: An outstanding jazz score highlights this tale of two American musicians in Paris whose lives are changed by tourists.
programme.title: Paris Blues

programme.desc: A newspaper editor (Jeffrey Lynn) blasts big business, then needs a big-business man's (Donald Crisp) help.
programme.title: Home Town Story

programme.desc: Married lawyers (Spencer Tracy, Katharine Hepburn) clash in and out of court over a woman's (Judy Holliday) right to shoot her husband and his lover.
programme.title: Adam's Rib

programme.desc: A suave stranger (Cary Grant) helps a chic widow (Audrey Hepburn) stalked by four men looking for loot in Paris.
programme.title: Charade

programme.desc: Two guys (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) and a girl (Melody Anderson) brave jungle hazards to find an Aztec temple filled with gold.
programme.title: Firewalker

programme.desc: While on a business trip, an ambitious, young lawyer immediately falls in love with a stranger. They wed the following day, and tragedy soon strikes.
programme.title: Made for Each Other

programme.desc: An outlaw (Dean Martin) plans to swap a cavalry colonel's (Brian Keith) wife (Honor Blackman) for a Gatling gun needed to rob a Mexican bandit.
programme.title: Something Big

programme.desc: Blondie (Penny Singleton) frets when Dagwood (Arthur Lake) buys a horse instead of a house.
programme.title: It's a Great Life

programme.desc: A folksy New England poet (Gary Cooper) inherits $20 million he doesn't want and tells a New York newswoman (Jean Arthur) why.
programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes to Town

programme.desc: Irish sheep herders (Deborah Kerr, Robert Mitchum) roam with their son and helper (Peter Ustinov), making a living in the 1920s Australia.
programme.title: The Sundowners

programme.desc: S05 E12 — Lucy and Mooney the Monkey Lucy goes to a psychiatrist after seeing a monkey everywhere she goes.
programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.desc: John Adams (William Daniels), Benjamin Franklin (Howard da Silva) and Thomas Jefferson (Ken Howard) lead the way to the Colonies' Declaration of Independence.

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: The Jim Bakker Show
programme.desc: The Jim Bakker Show is an hour-long daily Christian broadcast that is aired throughout the United States, Canada, and the entire world through multiple broadcasts on Pioneer Network, Directv, Dish Network and other world wide satellites, and the PTL Television Network. Join Jim and Lori as they bring to the stage today’s greatest prophets, health experts, and leaders of the Christian world to discuss and understand Biblical prophecy and the Revelations of Gods Word.

programme.title: The Mondo Show
programme.desc: The Mondo Show is real, it’s raw, with an organicfeel to the conversation. Sometimes I will be talking directly to you theaudience, and at other times I will place you in the middle of theconversation, so you can experience what is really being said. The subject matter for the conversation and thequestions will be the things people are afraid to ask, even though it is whateveryone is thinking. I want you to meet the men and women who are making adifference in our communities, in our culture, and in our lives. It’s a journeyto understand the misunderstood. It’s The Mondo Show.

programme.title: VFI News
programme.desc: VFI News with Barry Segal brings you timely, insightful reports on Israel, the Middle East, andglobal events - analysed through a biblical and prophetic lens.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Jentezen Franklin is the Senior Pastor of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church. Each week his television program, Kingdom Connection, is broadcast on major networks all over the world. A New York Times best-selling author, Jentezen has written ten books including his most recent Acres of Diamonds, Love Like You’ve Never Been Hurt, the ground-breaking Fasting and Right People-Right Place-Right Plan.

programme.title: Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

programme.title: 2026 Make it your Best
programme.desc: Welcome to 2026 — a new chapter, not because the calendar has changed, but because you have the opportunity to choose differently. It is about understanding that you are always guided and supported, even when the path ahead seems unclear. Your spiritual journey is unique.
